text:
The Unnamed Slime Monster is a type of Greed Island creature. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 136 

Overview

It is a type of slime creature that has eyes and a mouth that stays stationary and doesn't do much, but is still hard to defeat due to its durable body. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Gon and Killua encounter this monster while roaming Greed Island, but are unable to do anything, because Biscuit has yet to teach them how to defeat it. 

Card

Unknown
